name: HorriblePack Cards Against Horror
blackCards: After the Ouija board spelled "HELP", the real monster showed up: ___.
PICK 2 - The last thing I Googled before being eaten by ___ was ___.
whiteCards: Freddy Krueger's sweater in a laundry basket
Pennywise doing stand-up at an elementary school
a Tupperware full of Jason Voorhees' teeth
Hannibal Lecter teaching a vegan cooking class
Michael Myers' off switch behind his mask
the Loch Ness Monster's Grindr profile
